title: aspidium forsteri
intro: Aspidium forsteri, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Aspidium forsteri are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Aspidium forsteri can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in herbal supplements.
